strategy_snapshot.topology: AI Distributed Inference Fleet -> Robotaxi Network (Texas Triangle) -> AI5 Vertical Integration
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: Cybercab high-volume production @ Giga Texas + FSD v14.3 commercialisation
